_comment: Human annotations merged into the machine-generated ZP map tables in
dev/lib/README.md (see tools/gen_zp_map.py). The parser supplies the
facts (.res slots, .importzp/.exportzp, fixed := $xx equates); THIS file
supplies the judgement (ownership, liveness caveats, seam membership).
Edit here, then re-run tools/gen_zp_map.py -- never edit the generated
Keys: 'baseline' = symbol -> owner text for the apple1/zp.inc $00-$07
textual includes that use CALLER-defined bare symbols (no .res/.importzp
of their own, invisible to the parser) -> {slots, importzp, notes}.

baseline.tmp: general scratch — `kbd.asm`, `math.asm`, `tms9918*.asm`, chess. Pure scratch: any lib JSR may clobber it
baseline.tmp2: general scratch — `math.asm`, `tms9918m2.asm`, chess. Pure scratch: any lib JSR may clobber it

files.apple1/print.asm: baseline pair — `.ifndef`-guarded duplicate of the `zp.inc` slots (aliases when `zp.inc` is included first)
files.basicrt/basicrt_float.s: standalone binary32 software-float runtime state (FP accumulators + scratch)
files.basicrt/basicrt_gen2.s: BASIC-compiler runtime, GEN2 backend — whole `rt_*` seam, link-exclusive with `basicrt_tms.s`
files.basicrt/basicrt_tms.s: BASIC-compiler runtime, TMS backend — whole `rt_*` seam, link-exclusive with `basicrt_gen2.s`; drives `tms9918m2.asm`'s `pix_*`/`ln_*`
files.games/rogue/shadowcast.asm: recursive-shadowcast FOV state; `cur_x`/`cur_y` may be pre-declared by the caller (`.ifndef`-guarded)
files.gen2/gen2_bubble.asm: bubble raster (GEN2 side of the `draw_bubble` shadow pair)
files.gen2/gen2_logom2.asm: GEN2 re-export of the whole LOGO m2 seam (`pix_*`/`ln_*`/`pen_color`) — link-exclusive with `tms9918/tms9918m2.asm`
files.gen2c/gen2_blit.s: cc65-track hot-path kernels; imports cc65's `ptr1`/`ptr2`/`tmp1`-`tmp4` (none.lib `zeropage.o`), plus `_gen2_*` C-ABI argument slots
files.m6502/math.asm: caller-declared/`.exportzp`'d; owns no ZP itself (+ BSS `prod_lo/hi`, `sign_flag`, `lfsr_lo/hi`). `arg_*` are a shared argument/return window — NOT live across calls into other `arg_*` users
files.m6502/multiply.asm: baseline pair — `.ifndef`-guarded duplicate of the `zp.inc` slots
files.m6502/prng16.asm: shared with `prng8.asm` **by design** (`.ifndef`-guarded): both stir ONE state pair — use one generator per program
files.tms9918/bubble.asm: bubble raster (TMS side of the `draw_bubble` shadow pair)
files.tms9918/buffer_editor.asm: reuses `math.asm`'s `arg_*` argument window — not storage; reload per call
files.tms9918/sprite_helpers.asm: imports the caller's sprite shadow registers (`spr_*`)
files.tms9918/sprite_triangle.asm: reuses `math.asm`'s `arg_*` argument window — not storage; reload per call
files.tms9918/tms9918_console.asm: console cursor on top of the shared `vdp_*` slots
files.tms9918/tms9918_text.asm: same exported `vdp_*` names as `tms9918m1.asm` — shared on purpose (one of m1/text per link)
files.tms9918/tms9918m2.asm: bitmap/line raster state — the m2 side of the LOGO seam (link-exclusive with `gen2/gen2_logom2.asm`)

gen2/hgr_clear.asm.notes: `clear_hgr` trashes both (same pair as `hgr_plot.asm` — intended shared)
